title: veiled-market Resource Registry
description: Tracks every evaluated resource by source marketplace, plugin reference, and file path. Used to avoid redundant re-evaluation of unchanged content across discovery runs.

marketplace.description: Optional. Marketplace-level metadata for the generated marketplace.json files. Same structure as the 'marketplace' block in sources/plugins.json.

name.description: Marketplace identifier (kebab-case). Must be globally unique.
Name of the maintainer or team.

url.description: URL of the maintainer or organization.

plugins.description: Optional. Canonical list of finalized plugins for generation of both marketplace.json output files. Each entry conforms to the pluginEntry schema used by marketplace.json.

marketplaces.description: Top-level map keyed by source ID (matching an 'id' in sources/marketplaces.json). Each value is a plugin map.

skillMap.description: Map of skill_ref (file path within the repo, e.g. 'path/to/SKILL.md') → registry entry.

entry.description: Registry entry for a single discovered resource file.

sha.description: 40-character hex content hash (SHA-256 truncated) used to detect file changes between discovery runs.

last_evaluated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the last evaluation (e.g. '2026-03-06T05:30:40Z').

plugin.description: plugin domain this resource was discovered for (e.g. 'terraformer').

resource_type.description: The type of resource this entry represents. Set by discover.py; lets consumer scripts know the type without re-parsing the file path.

lang_tags.description: Technology/language tags applied to this resource (e.g. ['bash', 'hcl']).

platform_tags.description: Platform tags applied to this resource (e.g. ['aws', 'azure']). Bare tags; the 'platform/csp/', 'platform/ci/', 'platform/saas/' prefixes are added by platform_label() when creating GitHub labels.

score.description: AI-assigned quality scores (populated after evaluation stage). Empty object while recommendation is 'pending'.

relevance.description: How relevant the resource is to the target plugin.

completeness.description: Completeness of the resource (e.g. required frontmatter, safety instructions).

platform_fit.description: How well the resource fits the target platform(s).

recommendation.description: AI evaluation outcome. 'pending' = discovered, not yet scored. 'include' = use as-is. 'enrich' = include with additional context. 'exclude' = do not use.

issue_number.description: GitHub issue number created for this discovery, or null if none was created (e.g. dry-run).

notes.description: Free-text notes from the discovery or evaluation stage.

categories.description: Optional. One or more skill categories this resource belongs to.
